title: Solar System

vocabulary.meaning: a large object that moves around a star
the curved path an object follows around another object in space
a natural object that moves around a planet
an instrument used to look at far objects in space
far away in space or time

questions: What springs to mind when you hear the term 'solar system'?
What is your place in the solar system?
What is the best place in the solar system?
Do you know how our solar system got here?
How different do you think other solar systems are?
What do you think is beyond our solar system?
How is the Earth unique in our solar system?
Would you like to go for a tour of the solar system? Where would you like to go?
Do you think life exists on other solar systems?
What interesting fact do you know about our solar system?
What is the solar solar system?
How did the solar system get here?
What is the most interesting planet in the solar system?
Do you like reading news stories on the solar system?
What would you like scientists to find out about our solar system?
What would you explain about our solar system to an alien from another solar system?
Do you think humans will start destroying other parts of our solar system, just like we're destroying Earth?
In your language, are chocolate bars and cars named after parts of our solar system? (They are in English!)
Do you think governments on Earth will one day fight over who owns which parts of the solar system?
What do you think our solar system will look like several hundred billion years from now?
